goal: Extend /claude-warp-contract into the single adaptive entry point (spec + scale question-depth + auto-route single-shot/loop/harness + decompose big plans into subplans); deprecate /claude-warp-new; document one clear Plan-vs-Shape model.
verification: bash scripts/dev.sh verify (exit 0) + cold re-read of the Plan-vs-Shape doc
decomposed_by: manual (contract harness branch not yet built — this IS task 1's fix, applied by hand)

tasks.title: single-entry-router
tasks.description: Extend contract Phase 1 branch from loop/goal to single-shot/loop/harness. Port /claude-warp-new's recurrence + stage-count + scope-size assessment so the contract auto-classifies the shape (and would have caught THIS spec as a harness).
tasks.result: Phase 1 branch now classifies single-shot/loop/harness; ported recurrence+stage+scope assessment; states Plan-vs-Shape inline

tasks.title: subplan-decomposition
tasks.description: For kind:harness, contract hands the contract off to /claude-warp-new-harness (which already decomposes into task units). Define the harness branch's materialise + handoff so a big plan becomes subplans.
tasks.result: Phase 9 materialise + Phase 10 handoff now handle kind:harness — delegate decomposition to new-harness

tasks.title: adaptive-question-depth
tasks.description: Confirm + document that question count scales with complexity (small goal <=3 Qs; big plan asks as many as needed). Mostly surfacing the existing risk-adaptive rigor in the right place.
tasks.result: Phase 4 documents depth scaling with shape: goal <=3 Qs, harness needs subplan elicitation

tasks.title: deprecate-new
tasks.description: Remove /claude-warp-new; repoint references (README, docs, CLAUDE.md.tpl); contract description becomes the 'start here' entry. SURFACE-GATE the deletion commit (breaking CLI change).
tasks.result: hard-deleted skills/claude-warp-new (user-approved at surface gate); repointed README, loop-harness, usage, CLAUDE.md.tpl, setup, inventory; contract is now start-here entry

tasks.title: conceptual-model-doc
tasks.description: Write ONE unambiguous Plan-vs-Shape section (docs + README): a PLAN is the spec (any size); goal/loop/harness are SHAPES; small plan = single-shot, big plan w/ subplans = harness. Written LAST, reflecting the shipped design.
tasks.result: Plan-vs-Shape model: full section in loop-harness.md, concise in README, pointer in goal-readiness.md

tasks.title: no-regression + release
tasks.description: bash scripts/dev.sh verify exits 0 after each task; cut a release when all tasks done.
